integrate.note: REPORT: S9.5 -> COMPLETED. REQ-150/016 gain their S9.5 share; REQ-150 stays IN_PROGRESS until S9.11 (P3 physics share + P9 visual share both required); REQ-016 stays IN_PROGRESS (P10 applies to authored content).

report.note: HANDOFF: writing the comprehensive meta/handoff_latest.json now (session stops after S9.5 per explicit user scope: 'finish P9 till 9.5')

acceptance.criterion: anticipation frames proven end-to-end (idle vs prejump distinct cached bitmaps, integration test); squash-stretch derives from velocity with identity-at-rest + monotonic clamp; jump/landing bursts fire exactly once via edge detection into the S9.4 ParticlePool

DefeatMarker: null unless runState==='defeated', else {position, critical:true} always; resolves dm-0089's screen-time question via the existing fixed-step/render decoupling (dm-0097), no Lifecycle.ts change
